nasb.text: Then Saul sent messengers to see David, saying, “Bring him up to me on his bed, that I may put him to death.”

esv.text: Then Saul sent the messengers to see David, saying, “Bring him up to me in the bed, that I may kill him.”

cnv.text: 掃羅又派人去看大衛說：“你們把他連床一起抬到我這裡來，我好殺死他。”

ccb.text: 扫罗又派人去见大卫，并吩咐说：“把他连床一起抬来，我好杀他。”
